name: Named Pipe Impersonation for Privilege Escalation
description: Detects named pipe creation and impersonation commonly used in privilege escalation
query:
// Detect named pipe impersonation patterns
// Used by tools like PsExec and PrintSpoofer
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(ImpersonateNamedPipeClient|CreateNamedPipe|PrintSpoofer|JuicyPotato|RottenPotato|SweetPotato|GodPotato)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
